convicted_cases.punishment: 1 year simple imprisonment was ordered. Completely observed the said 1 Year simple imprisonment.
convicted_cases.appeal_status: 1. On 30.04.2009, Honble J.M Thuraiyur in CC No. 239/2002 passed an order of conviction for the period of 2 years imprisonment, 2. On 14-09-2011, Honble Tiruchirappalli Addl. Sessions Court (Fast Track) No: 2 confirmed the order passed by the J.M. Thuraiyur in Crl.A. No: 24/2009, 3. On 06.02.2014, Honble Madras High Court of Madurai Bench set aside the orders of Trial court and 1st Appellate Court acquitted the deponent by allowing the appeal in CRL.R.C(MD). No 804/2011., 3. On 06.02.2014, Honble Madras High Court of Madurai Bench set aside the orders of Trial court and 1st Appellate Court acquitted the deponent by allowing the appeal in CRL.R.C(MD). No: 804/2011., No any appeal against the Order of Honble Supreme Court Dt:23-10-2019. As per Section 8(3) of Representation of the People Act 1951, the above said conviction is no bar to the deponent to contest the present Election.

discrepancies.description: Calculated Net Worth is ₹73,581,918, but 5-year family income is only ₹8,513,990. Unexplained wealth discrepancy of ₹65,067,928.
